# Import CODA Bank Statement

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:c84da2d263d96adc15ded6cdba93e4cf9d37871453887da62189892329ae8f78
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module allows you to import your bank transactions with a standard
**CODA** file (you'll find samples in the 'data' folder).

This module was renamed in v14 to follow the behavior of the parent OCA
module account_statement_module.

This is an alternative to the l10n_be_coda module in Odoo Enterprise. It
uses the external python lib
[pycoda](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/pycoda) as parser.

Expected benefits:

- The pycoda parser is a better-tested external python lib.
- Better separation between file parsing and mapping of these data in
  Odoo.
- The module only depends of account_bank_statement_import.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Installation

To install this module, you need to install the python library
[pycoda](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/pycoda).

Tests for import bank statement coda file format
(account.statement.import)

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_statement_import_coda.wizard.account_statement_import_coda.AccountStatementImport.get_st_vals
documentation:
This method return a dict of vals that can be passed to
create method of statement.
\:return: dict of vals that represent additional infos for the statement

> found in the file.
> {
>
> > 'name': paper_seq_number
> > 'balance_start': balance_start,
> > 'balance_end_real': balance_end_real,
> > 'transactions': transactions
>
> }

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_statement_import_coda.wizard.account_statement_import_coda.AccountStatementImport.get_st_line_note
documentation: This method returns a formatted note from line information

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_statement_import_coda.wizard.account_statement_import_coda.AccountStatementImport.get_st_line_vals
documentation:
This method must return a dict of vals that can be passed to create
method of statement line in order to record it. It is the
responsibility of every parser to give this dict of vals,
so each one can implement his own way of recording the lines.

> ```
> param
>
> line: a dict of vals that represent a line of
> ```
>
> result_row_list
> \:return: dict of values to give to the create method of
> statement line,
>
> > > it MUST contain at least:
> >
> > {
> >
> > : 'date':value,
> >   'amount':value,
> >   'payment_ref':value,
> >
> > }
